title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, push and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers. Talk to any Ollama model from web or server scripts.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat backends in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). Chat interface, model manager, RAG, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Generate, chat, pull, push and list models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple interface to generate, chat and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama with ergonomic commands, config files and batch scripting helpers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like plugin for VS Code that uses Ollama models for local, private code completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset. Use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama. Targets .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) deployments of Ollama server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model caching.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models with per-guild model choice.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s HTTP API.

title: ollama-gpt4all
summary: Converter and docs to run GPT4All-J quantized models inside Ollama using Modelfile templates.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component template that connects to Ollama and supports file upload RAG out of the box.
